options.description: A list of options specifying study information, selecting workflow modules, and defining global variable defaults

data.name.description: A short name for your dataset that is used for project and file names

id.var.description: The name of the ID variable, which is used to identify observations

id.pattern.description: A Regular Expression that must be fulfilled for all values of the variable specified in id.var

consent.description: Indicate if informed consent will be checked

remove.vars.description: Indicate if variables in the data that are missing from the metadata should be removed

vars.remove.description: Indicate if variables in the data that are missing from the metadata should be removed

touch.na.description: Indicate if NAs should be changed to missing codes

na.touch.description: Indicate if NAs should be changed to missing codes

var.list.description: A list of all variables, where variable-specific information is provided

type.description: The variable type is the main variable characteristic and the only key that is always required

var.groups.description: A list of variable groups with information that applies to the group instead of individual variables

na.codes.description: A list of codes that will represent missing values in the processed data set

contras.description: A list of implausible combinations of values from two variables
